name: Resilio Sync
tagline: Set up Sync to synchronize or share files without having to store your data in the cloud.
description:
Set up Sync to synchronize or share files without having to store your data in the cloud.


_Template derived from caprover/one-click-apps (caprover@bd357c9, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  resilio-sync:
    image: resilio/sync:2.6.4
    restart: unless-stopped
    volumes:
      - resilio-sync-data:/mnt/sync
    ports:
      - 42104:8888
volumes:
  resilio-sync-data: null
